---
title: "UAI"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-20"
---
VIIRs tiff (dimensions 180W left border, 60W right border, 75N upper border, 0 lower border) transform pixel to coordinate and take coordinates/occurences within 100km of san diego for each species... 

Each pixel already corresponds to a log scaled radiance (Eldridge et. al)...

Develop CSV of species occurences per coordinate pair and corresponding radiance value


```{r, setup}

library(terra)
library(tidyverse)

# load VIIRS
viirs <- rast("the_VIIRS_NA_75N_00N_180W_60W.tif")
# set CRS for VIIRS
ext(viirs) <- ext(-180, -60, 0, 75)
crs(viirs) <- "EPSG:4326"
extract_viirs_for_species <- function(input_csv, output_csv, species_name) {
  
  #read coordinate CSV and previous radiance values if there already
  species_coords <- read_csv(input_csv, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
    select(-any_of(c("radiance", "viirs_radiance", "log_radiance")))
  
  # convert coordinate to long/lat
  species_points <- vect(
    species_coords,
    geom = c("LONGITUDE", "LATITUDE"),
    crs = "EPSG:4326"
  )
  
  # extract  radiance
  extracted_values <- terra::extract(viirs, species_points)
  
  # log transform radiance
  species_coords_with_radiance <- species_coords %>%
    mutate(
      radiance = extracted_values[[2]],
      log_radiance = log(radiance + 1)
    )
  
 stats_data <- species_coords_with_radiance %>%
    filter(!is.na(log_radiance), !is.na(occurrence_count))
  
  # Total number of occurrences
  total_occurrences <- sum(stats_data$occurrence_count)
  
  # Weighted average log radiance
  weighted_avg_log_radiance <- sum(
    stats_data$log_radiance * stats_data$occurrence_count
  ) / total_occurrences
  
  # Weighted standard deviation, treating occurrence_count as repeated observations
  weighted_sd_log_radiance <- sqrt(
    sum(
      stats_data$occurrence_count *
        (stats_data$log_radiance - weighted_avg_log_radiance)^2
    ) / (total_occurrences - 1)
  )
  
  # Standard error
  standard_error_log_radiance <- weighted_sd_log_radiance / sqrt(total_occurrences)
  
  # Print results
  cat("\n", species_name, "\n")
  cat("Weighted average log(radiance + 1) aka UAI:", weighted_avg_log_radiance, "\n")
  cat("Weighted SD of log(radiance + 1) aka UAI:", weighted_sd_log_radiance, "\n")
  cat("Standard error:", standard_error_log_radiance, "\n")
  cat("Total occurrences used:", total_occurrences, "\n\n")
  
  # Save output CSV
  write_csv(species_coords_with_radiance, output_csv)
  
  return(species_coords_with_radiance)
}
```

```{r barnswallow_viirs}
barnswallow_viirs <- extract_viirs_for_species(
  input_csv = "REAL_barnswallow_coordinates_within_100km_of_san_diego.csv",
  output_csv = "REAL_barnswallow_coordinates_with_viirs_log_radiance.csv",
  species_name = "Barn Swallow"
)
```

```{r california_quail_viirs}
california_quail_viirs <- extract_viirs_for_species(
  input_csv = "~/Downloads/C&SBIO_185_PROJECT/REAL_california_quail_coordinates_within_100km_of_san_diego.csv",
  output_csv = "REAL_california_quail_coordinates_with_viirs_radiance.csv",
  species_name = "California Quail"
)

print(california_quail_viirs)
```

```{r house_sparrow_viirs}
house_sparrow_viirs <- extract_viirs_for_species(
  input_csv = "~/Downloads/C&SBIO_185_PROJECT/REAL_housesparrow_coordinates_within_100km_of_san_diego.csv",
  output_csv = "REAL_housesparrow_coordinates_with_viirs_radiance.csv",
  species_name = "House Swallow"
)

print(house_sparrow_viirs)
```

```{r peregrine_falcon_viirs}
peregrine_falcon_viirs <- extract_viirs_for_species(
  input_csv = "~/Downloads/C&SBIO_185_PROJECT/REAL_peregrinefalcon_coordinates_within_100km_of_san_diego.csv",
  output_csv = "REAL_peregrinefalcon_coordinates_with_viirs_radiance.csv",
  species_name = "Peregrine Falcon"
)

print(peregrine_falcon_viirs)
```

```{r rock_pigeon_viirs}
rock_pigeon_viirs <- extract_viirs_for_species(
  input_csv = "~/Downloads/C&SBIO_185_PROJECT/REAL_rockpigeon_coordinates_within_100km_of_san_diego.csv",
  output_csv = "REAL_rock_pigeon_coordinates_with_viirs_radiance.csv",
  species_name = "Rock Pigeon"
)

print(rock_pigeon_viirs)
```
